description: Cookie consent banner with granular category controls and persistence

attributes.name: persist
attributes.description: VBStore key under namespace 'consent' for storing consent

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: Banner position. Center uses modal dialog.

attributes.name: trigger
attributes.description: CSS selector for a re-open button (e.g. #manage-cookies)

attributes.name: expires
attributes.description: Days until consent expires. 0 or 'never' disables expiry.

structure.description: Banner container — shown until consent is given
Granular preference toggles (optional, for save mode)
Save granular preferences button (optional, used with checkboxes)

childAttributes.name: value
childAttributes.description: Action button type — accept all, reject all, or save granular preferences

childAttributes.name: name
childAttributes.description: Preference category name stored in the consent cookie

events.name: consent-banner:save
events.description: Fired when user saves granular preferences
